race.comment: MISS JOELENE (14) worked home okay in heavy going over the mile at Doomben two back then couldn't cope with the heartbreaking pressure in Pride Of Jenni's Hollindale last start. Very fit and loves soft going. In the right race to bounce back to form. TAVI TIME (4) gave away too much start but went through his gears impressively in the Scone Cup over a mile last time out. Very fit and has placed at all three runs over 1800m. Big chance if the track is no worse than soft. MILITARIZE (9) wound back the clock when third in the Doncaster two back then couldn't keep up in the Hollindale most recently. Not prepared to rule him out with J Mac back aboard. FUTURE HISTORY (5) was brave in defeat first-up in the 2000m Chairman's at Doomben a fortnight ago. Coming back in trip isn't ideal but a wet track even things up.
